subject: [PATCH 6/8] mm: use zone lock guard in put_page_back_buddy()

reviews.author: Dmitry Ilvokhin
reviews.summary: Posted the first patch in an 8-part series to introduce a zone lock guard in put_page_back_buddy().

2026-03-12.patch_summary: This patch series aims to simplify the locking mechanism in the mm/page_alloc.c file by introducing a zone lock guard in put_page_back_buddy(). The current explicit lock/unlock pattern is replaced with automatic scope-based cleanup, reducing code complexity and improving maintainability.
